name: Product Defects
description: Test failed due to an assertion error — likely a real application bug.

name: Test Defects
description: Test broke with an unexpected exception — likely a test code issue.

name: Flaky Tests
description: Tests that are known to be unstable and may pass on retry.

name: Infrastructure / Timeout Issues
description: Failures caused by timeouts, WebDriver crashes, or network issues.

name: Element Not Found
description: Failures due to missing or stale elements on the page.
